creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #8)
> Apache is non-threaded per default (MPM_PREFORK=on, MPM_WORKER=off, MPM_EVENT=off) 

Oh, sorry, I thought you said before that "Default config is: MPM_WORKER=off MPM_EVENT=on"

If the default is MPM_PREFORK, then everything is fine. Thank you again.
